2024-10-11T09:47:00.CONTENT_EN: The traffic on the Shenzhen Bay Bridge (Shenzhen bound) is very busy at the moment. Members of the public are advised to plan ahead their journeys, travel outside peak periods as far as possible and should reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing. Meanwhile, members of the public may consider using the other boundary control points for travelling to Shenzhen.
2024-10-11T09:47:00.CONTENT_CN: 深圳灣公路大橋(往深圳方向)的交通現時非常繁忙。請市民妥善規劃行程，盡量選擇於非繁忙時段出行，並應預留充裕交通時間，在輪候時保持忍讓。同時，市民亦請考慮使用其他口岸過境前往深圳。

2024-10-11T10:05:00.CONTENT_EN: In view that there is a lot of cross-boundary private cars entering Shenzhen Bay Boundary Control Point, the waiting time for proceeding to the clearance area for departure procedures might require around 30 minutes. The Police is implementing Phase II special traffic arrangement at Shenzhen Bay Boundary Control Point： • The traffic arrangements for goods vehicles remain unchanged, they will continue to enter the holding area awaiting clearance through the Goods Vehicles Lanes. • Public transport vehicles, including cross-boundary coaches, franchised buses, green minibuses and taxis will continue to enter the boundary control point through the Passenger Vehicles Lanes as usual. • Cross-boundary private cars must keep left on the Shenzhen Bay Bridge and then enter the designated waiting area through the Goods Vehicles Lanes. Private cars must queue up and await further instructions to proceed to the clearance area for departure procedures. • Please be patient when waiting, thank you very much for your cooperation.
2024-10-11T10:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 鑑於進入深圳灣管制站的跨境私家車車輛眾多，等候駛往旅檢區進行離境手續的時間可能需要30分鐘，警方現正在深圳灣管制站實施第二階段特別交通安排： －對貨車的交通安排維持不變，即繼續沿貨車通道進入貨車等候區後前往清關； －對公共運輸車輛，包括跨境巴士、專營巴士、專線小巴及的士的交通安排維持不變，即繼續沿客車通道進入管制站；及 －跨境私家車須沿深圳灣公路大橋靠左行駛，然後沿貨車通道進入一個預設的私家車等候區排隊，並等候進一步指示駛往旅檢區進行離境手續。 －政府呼籲市民耐心等候，多謝合作。

2024-10-11T13:18:00.CONTENT_EN: The traffic volume at Lok Ma Chau Boundary Control Point resumes normal now, all vehicles should use the original driving routes to the boundary control point. Motorists should pay attention to the latest traffic news and take heed of the instructions from the police officers at the scene.
2024-10-11T13:18:00.CONTENT_CN: 現時落馬洲管制站車輛數目回復正常水平，所有車輛均可沿用原有行車路線進入管制站。駕車人士應密切留意最新交通消息，並遵從現場警務人員的指示。

2024-10-11T12:05:00.CONTENT_EN: The vehicle clearance plaza (Zhuhai bound) of the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Zhuhai Port is very busy now and the waiting time of Gold Bus passengers is longer. Members of the public who plan to drive their private cars or take Gold Bus to Zhuhai/Macao via HZMB are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing. The public may check the real time situation of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/).
2024-10-11T12:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往珠海方向)的車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙，金巴乘客亦需輪候較長時間。計劃駕駛私家車或乘搭金巴經大橋往珠澳的市民請妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。市民可透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況。

Members of the public who plan to drive their private cars or take Gold Bus to Zhuhai/Macao via HZMB are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing. Motorists should pay attention to the latest traffic news and take heed of the instructions from the police officers at the scene. Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau Spur Line Control Points The earlier busy crowd situation has eased. Operation of related MTR services resume normal.
2024-10-11T14:47:00.CONTENT_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往珠海方向)的車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙，金巴乘客亦需輪候較長時間。計劃駕駛私家車或乘搭金巴經大橋往珠澳的市民請妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。市民可透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況。 深圳灣管制站 現時深圳灣管制站車輛數目回復正常水平，所有車輛均可沿用原有行車路線進入管制站。駕車人士應密切留意最新交通消息，並遵從現場警務人員的指示。 羅湖及落馬洲支線管制站 較早前繁忙的人流情況現已舒緩，有關的港鐵服務運作大致正常。

2024-10-11T13:03:00.CONTENT_EN: As it is travel peak period, there are currently large crowds crossing the boundary at the Lo Wu and Lok Man Chau Spur Line control points. In response to the crowd control at the boundary crossings, train service frequency on East Rail Line has been adjusted. Please pay attention to the destination of the trains. Additional staff have been deployed to East Ral Line stations to assist passengers. Please allow more time to travel.
2024-10-11T13:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 因應假日出行高峰，目前使用羅湖及落馬洲支線管制站人數眾多，為配合關口人潮管制措施，東鐵綫的個別列車班次已作出調整，請乘客留意列車的終點站。 東鐵綫車站已加派人手協助乘客。請乘客為行程預留時間。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: More inbound cross boundary vehicles will travel via the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) tomorrow
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 明天將有較多跨境車輛使用港珠澳大橋回港
description.LOCATION_EN: More inbound cross boundary vehicles will travel via the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) tomorrow
description.LOCATION_CN: 明天將有較多跨境車輛使用港珠澳大橋回港

2024-10-12T21:06:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) reminds members of public who would drive their private cars to and from the Mainland / Macao to note that it is anticipated more inbound cross boundary vehicles will travel via the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) tomorrow (13 Oct). The public are advised to plan their journeys ahead and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. The public can also make use of "HKeMobility" to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at the inbound and outbound vehicle plaza of HZMB Hong Kong Port, and they can also check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/).Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application.
2024-10-12T21:06:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署請駕駛私家車往返內地／澳門的市民注意，由於預計明天（即10月13日）將有較多跨境車輛使用港珠澳大橋回港，請市民及早計劃行程，及盡量選擇於非繁忙時段出行。市民亦可透過「香港出行易」查閱港珠澳大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，以及透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況。 運輸署亦請市民留意電台、電視台及運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

2024-10-13T03:24:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) reminds members of public who would drive their private cars to and from the Mainland / Macao to note that it is anticipated more inbound cross boundary vehicles will travel via the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) today (13 Oct). The public are advised to plan their journeys ahead and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. The public can also make use of "HKeMobility" to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at the inbound and outbound vehicle plaza of HZMB Hong Kong Port, and they can also check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/).Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application.
